section_miscategorizations.text: He reports that his potassium level was 4.0 one week ago.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Lab values belong in Objective; however, this is framed as patient-reported prior result, so the impact of leaving it in Subjective is limited.

This appears to be the same value the patient reported rather than a clearly documented new lab result; as such it may more accurately reflect patient-reported history, but the discrepancy is organizational rather than misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: Spironolactone is being considered as a potential treatment option.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Treatment consideration and initiation belong in the Plan; here it is mentioned in Assessment while the actual order is correctly placed in Plan, so the misplacement is organizational and not substantially misleading.
